name: glimpse
description: Asset pipeline for Glimpse parallax photo scenes

examples.slice only: IMAGE=public/Tahoe.webp DEPTH=public/Tahoe-depth-map.webp OUTPUT=public/layers/Tahoe NAME=tahoe npm run slice
examples.full pipeline: IMAGE=public/Tahoe.webp DEPTH=public/Tahoe-depth-map.webp OUTPUT=public/layers/Tahoe NAME=tahoe npm run process
